package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for time_after_in_loop: time.After(...) is allocated inside loops instead of reusing a timer or deadline.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario400Positive(items []string) int {
	total := 0
	for range items {
		<-time.After(time.Millisecond)
		total++
	}
	return total
}
